videos.title: Mono-Green is Back and More Mite-y than Ever  $35 Budget Magic
videos.description:
Mono-Green has been horrible in Standard for years now. Can some powerful new Edge of Eternities cards bring the archetype back on just a $40 budget? Let's see!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/budget-magic-40-mite-y-mono-green-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7264010#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/7qV0l
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/EI3UY
